channel.title: Nvr on My Awesome Site
channel.description: Recent content in Nvr on My Awesome Site

item.title: Accessing RTSP IP CCTV From Media Player
item.author: wildanpastioke@gmail.com (Wildan)
item.description: RTSP stands for Real-time Streaming Protocol, which is a protocol capable of casting real-time CCTV streaming video. It does not rely on certain apps to do that. So, as long as the app supports RTSP (like MPV and VLC), it will work perfectly.
